cms.task_text: Kód kreslí čtverec, ale [hlp]chybí nastavení barvy pera[/hlp]. Doplňte blok pro nastavení barvy před smyčku.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="turtle_set_pen_color_fixed" x="50" y="50"><next><block type="turtle_set_pen_width"><value name="WIDTH"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">3</field></shadow></value><next><block type="controls_repeat_ext"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">100</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></next></block></next></block></xml>
